zh.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay是Geoffrey de Rançon和Fossefie Moncontour的兒子，出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安藍可。他和Isabelle d’Angoulème至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1194年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay是Geoffrey de Rançon和Fossefie Moncontour的儿子，出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安藍可。他和Isabelle d’Angoulème至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1194年。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rancon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Ovide.

French (Lançon): diminutive of Lance ‘lance, spear’, or perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived in a thickly wooded area, or a metonymic occupational name for a woodcutter, from Old French lançon ‘branch of a tree’. Compare Lanson .
French (Lançon): habitational name from the town so named, in Bouches-du-Rhône.

variants.name: Lanson
meanings: French: variant of Lançon (see Lancon 1 and 2) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this (or an altered form of Lancon 3). This surname is also found in England, where it is of Huguenot origin.
English: variant of   Langston  , itself probably a variant of   Langton  .

variants.name: Lance
meanings: English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Lanzo, originally a short form of various compound names with the first element land ‘land, territory’ (for example, Lambert ), but later used as an independent name. It was introduced to England by the Normans, for whom it was a popular name among the ruling classes, perhaps partly because of association with Old French lance ‘lance, spear’ (see 2 below).
French: metonymic occupational name for a soldier who carried a lance, or a nickname for a skilled fighter, from Old French lance ‘lance, spear’.
Americanized form of German   Lanz   and   Lenz  .

meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay was born in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France as the son of Geoffrey de Rançon and Fossefie Moncontour. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Isabelle d’Angoulème. He died in 1194.

fr.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay est né à Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, fils de Geoffrey de Rançon et Fossefie Moncontour. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Isabelle d’Angoulème. Il est décédé en 1194.

de.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay wurde in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich, als Sohn von Geoffrey de Rançon und Fossefie Moncontour geboren. Er hatte mit Isabelle d’Angoulème mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1194.

it.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay è nato il nel Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia come figlio di Geoffrey de Rançon e Fossefie Moncontour. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Isabelle d’Angoulème. Morì nel 1194.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencayはフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンランコンでGeoffrey de RançonとFossefie Moncontourの息子として生まれた。彼はIsabelle d’Angoulèmeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1194年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay(은)는 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 랭콘에서 Geoffrey de Rançon(와)과 Fossefie Moncontour의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Isabelle d’Angoulème(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay nasceu em Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França filho de Geoffrey de Rançon e Fossefie Moncontour. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Isabelle d’Angoulème. Ele faleceu em 1194.

ru.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay родился в местности ранкон, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. Его родителей звали Geoffrey de Rançon и Fossefie Moncontour. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Isabelle d’Angoulème. Он умер в 1194 г.

es.lifeSummary: Geoffroi IV de Rancon de Rancogne de Taillebourg de Marcillac Seigneur de Rancon, Taillebourg et Gencay nació en Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia como hijo de Geoffrey de Rançon y Fossefie Moncontour. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Isabelle d’Angoulème. Murió en 1194.
